name: Basil-Grilled Loin Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Balsamic or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Use fresh or frozen chops. If using frozen, thaw in the refrigerator overnight.
2. Dry chops well and slash each edge once. Arrange them in a single layer in a shallow glass baking dish.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together mustard, vinegar, garlic, and pepper. Gradually whisk in oil; then stir in basil. Pour over chops, turning to coat both sides. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, but not more than four hours.
4. Bring chops to room temperature for 30 minutes before grilling.
5. Place chops on an oiled grill, 4 to 6 inches above medium-hot coals or on a medium-high setting. Grill for about 5 minutes per side or until done to your liking.
